---
title : "Internal and External Attributions of Poverty - Germany 1991/ 2006"
date : "2007-01-01"
author : "Schneider, S. & Castillo, Juan-Carlos"
categories : ["Report"]
publication : " Working Paper (132). Berlin Humboldt University"
publication_short : " Working Paper (132). Berlin Humboldt University"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
---
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Schneider, S. & Castillo, Juan-Carlos (2007). *Internal and External Attributions of Poverty - Germany 1991/ 2006*.  Working Paper (132). Berlin Humboldt University

:::
